domain_archetypes.name: ambulance evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: ambulance signal changes while claim context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: claim boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: claim handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: denials regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: denials behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: random operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: random output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
